query:
-- named_unverified contacts from Apollo with emails — these should be send_ready but aren't
-- This is the "stale trust tier" problem
SELECT 
  c.enrichmentSource,
  c.emailVerified,
  c.verificationStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND c.email IS NOT NULL
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND (p.suppressed = false OR p.suppressed IS NULL)
GROUP BY c.enrichmentSource, c.emailVerified, c.verificationStatus
ORDER BY count DESC;
